subcodes.first_line: O thou who art firm in the Covenant! Thy letter hath been received concerning those blessed souls who have recently entered beneath the shade of the Divine Tree [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ثابت بر پیمان نامه شما رسید بنفوس مبارکه ایکه تازه در ظل سدره منتهی داخل
subcodes.subjects: @service to others; to the Cause of God, @spiritual transformation, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @teaching the Cause; call to teach
